name: Dreamcatcher UAU | You Are You
description:
Jeju Island, land of the fun times and relaxations for people both from South Korea or abroad. What supposed to be a healing trip turned literally to a healing session as you, Minji, Bora, and Yoohyeon spend 7 days together talking about how life take their turns on each of you. Well....we all live, learn, and regret right ? Healed or not, at least it felt better to share. Maybe from here you might find something or even...love ?

#DreamcatcherUAUDebut
